items.title_zh: 为什么《GTA 6》将在没有光盘的情况下启动 - 这对游戏玩家意味着什么
items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？

items.title_en: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
items.title_zh: 梅洛尼和特朗普：事实证明，这是一个非常公开的分歧，很难修复
items.desc_en: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.
items.desc_zh: 意大利总理不久前还被称为“特朗普耳语者”，但他们的关系却从公开攻击变成了人身侮辱。

items.title_en: DR Congo takes Rwanda to international court over decades of conflict
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国就数十年冲突将卢旺达告上国际法庭
items.desc_en: Kinshasa accuses its neighbour of committing various violations since the 1994 Rwanda genocide.
items.desc_zh: 金沙萨指责其邻国自 1994 年卢旺达种族灭绝以来犯下各种违法行为。

items.title_en: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震中母亲救女儿身亡
items.desc_en: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 589 people.
items.desc_zh: 埃克托·贝洛在社交媒体上写道，在这场造成至少 589 人死亡的地震中，“你们为我们的女儿献出了自己的生命”。

items.title_en: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified documents
items.title_zh: 前特朗普顾问约翰·博尔顿承认不当处理机密文件
items.desc_en: Bolton faces a prison sentence of up to five years and has agreed to pay $2.25m in fine, prosecutors say.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，博尔顿面临最高五年的监禁，并同意支付 225 万美元的罚款。

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: GTA 6 will cost $80 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
items.title_zh: GTA 6 售价 80 美元 - 实体版不包含光盘

items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。
